'''Krevas''' was a [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Krevaaki]].<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />
